Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}All right. It looks like everyone's here now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Well, it's been a week. What's our plan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Y-You're just so calm, Yukari-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I mean, panicking's not gonna solve anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Besides, it's been such a drag around here all week, and no one'll go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}We humans are quite resilient. With enough time, we can adapt to any situation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}So, how about it, everyone? It's time we discussed this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Have you made up your mind, Sanada-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}So you're going to fight Nyx?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I don't know. I mean, it supposedly can't be defeated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}What about you? What are your thoughts on it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Honestly, this is the first time I've ever really contemplated my own death.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}In any case, we have to choose one way or the other.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I obviously don't want to suffer. But that means we'd have to take a life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Not to mention we die no matter what we do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Then, do we all agree that we don't want to hurt Ryoji-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That's fair. I mean, it's not exactly normal to pick how you're gonna die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}What about you, Junpei? Have you decided?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}What the hell is wrong with you? You think this is a joke?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}This is death we're talking about here! Of course I'm scared![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And here you all are just chattin' it up like it's a goddamn picnic! Can't you see we're all gonna die!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Then what do you think we should do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}There's nothing I can do. He's the only one who can kill him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}This whole thing is your fault.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}You had that thing inside you and didn't even know it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You raised it, dammit! If it weren't for you, none of this would've happened![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}You're supposed to be "special," right!? Then do something about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Stop it, Junpei! It's not his fault![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}And the only reason we even have a choice is because he carried it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}It doesn't matter how many times I tell myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I know this doesn't fix anything, and it scares the hell out of me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I know how you feel, Junpei-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}We're all scared. I'm scared, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I've never felt so cornered in my life. I can't stop shaking...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Same here. We're all in the same boat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}And hey, I'm sorry for teasing you earlier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}I just... don't want to forget everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I've learned so much since coming here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I'm sorry. I didn't mean to yell at you like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}I don't think any of us can blame you right now, Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}So don't worry about it. Right, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I knew the truth deep down, but still.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}You got nothin' to be sorry for.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}I knew the truth deep down, but still.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}All right, let's put a pause on any unnecessary gatherings for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}Ryoji said he'll be back on New Year's Eve. Let's just try to go about our lives until then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}We have some time, so let's consider our options while we still can.[n]{f 1 1}
